ingredients: 2 lbs fish steaks or 2 whole medium fish, cleaned
12 pieces fresh or frozen kamias (bilimbi) (souring agent)
Salt and black pepper, to taste
steps: Bring water to a boil in a large pot.
Add tomatoes, kamias, and onion. Cover and boil about 8 minutes.
Add fish and long green peppers. Cover and cook over medium heat 10 to 12 minutes, until fish is cooked through.
Add mustard greens and season with salt and pepper. Simmer 1 to 2 minutes and serve hot with rice.
tips: Simmer gently so the fish stays intact; taste the broth before seasoning since the souring agent can vary in intensity.

sources.title: Sinigang na Isda sa Kamias (Fish Sinigang)
